seoTitle: St Leonards vs St Peters — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Leonards and St Peters. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Leonards vs St Peters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Leonards and St Peters.
heading: St Leonards vs St Peters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Leonards, New South Wales and St Peters, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Leonards has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to St Peters (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Leonards or St Peters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Leonards has a flood risk score of 27/100, while St Peters scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Leonards scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. St Peters scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Leonards or St Peters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Leonards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
